captures.notes: Canonical source link for attribution and reference framing; local evidence below is generated from scratch for learning review.
Local generated rebuild screenshot showing thick routed vector lines, glow edge, dash packets, and depth-grid framing; not copied from the source demo.
Local generated motion clip isolates the moving dash-packet behavior along layered bezier routes; not copied from the source demo.
Standalone local HTML/SVG exercise that reconstructs the primitive with bezier paths, glow strokes, and animated dash segments.
Manifest lists only generated local learning evidence plus source-link attribution boundaries.

payload.control_model: three cubic-bezier routes with explicit start, control, and end anchors
payload.depth_model: overlap ordering plus glow occlusion creates a shallow 3D route stack without copying source geometry
payload.line_form: wide ribbon stroke with rounded caps and high-chroma emissive edge
payload.motion_model: short dash packets slide along the base route while the full ribbon remains visible
payload.rebuild_scope: local generated study from the primitive, not an asset capture from the source site
payload.spatial_role: signal route through a dark technical grid

modules.review_notes: Complete for first-pass learning: local screenshot, motion clip, and code note all point to the same primitive.

payload.background_system: low-contrast technical grid to expose path curvature and crossing order
payload.glow_stack: blurred duplicate stroke below a crisp vector core
payload.surface_model: flat SVG stroke approximating the visual grammar of meshline ribbons
payload.visibility_rule: moving white packets remain legible against high-saturation base strokes

modules.review_notes: Material decomposition is explicit enough for a learner to rebuild color, glow, and motion layers separately.

payload.animation_budget: dashoffset-only animation in the local HTML note; GIF evidence is 24 frames at 960x540

modules.review_notes: Runtime notes are complete for the local SVG reconstruction; real Three.js/WebGPU profiling remains outside this first gold case.

payload.evidence_layer: local screenshot and GIF prove visual state and motion state separately
payload.review_gap: canonical source remains link-only; local rebuild is used for teachable mechanics
payload.route_decision: convert abstract source trail into three inspectable bezier paths with labeled local assets
payload.source_trail: canonical external source plus generated local reconstruction
payload.uncertainty: exact upstream shader implementation is not claimed

modules.review_notes: VULCA mapping is complete because source, evidence, gap, decision, and uncertainty are all represented.

summary: Contemporary 3D vector route reference rebuilt as a local meshline learning primitive with screenshot, motion, code, and asset evidence.
title: Makio MeshLine
why_relevant: Core learning source for thick 3D vector routes, animated trails, glow materials, dash behavior, and VULCA source-trail translation.
